name: Yorkshire Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Allow the eggs to come to room temperature before using.
3. Beat the eggs slightly.
4. Add flour and milk to the beaten eggs, mixing thoroughly.
5. Melt butter in a baking dish.
6. Pour the batter into the melted butter.
7. Bake for 15 minutes until the pancakes rise.
8. Serve sprinkled with lemon juice and powdered sugar.
